nameMeanings.name: Mascy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Maxey
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Northamptonshire, so named from the Old English personal name Maccus + Old English ēg ‘island’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Macasa ‘descendant of Macus’, a personal name of uncertain origin. It may be a variant of Magnus .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Hamon Mascy III was born in 1347, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Agathe De Theray. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Hamon Mascy III est né en 1347, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agathe De Theray. Il est décédé en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Dunham Massey, Bucklow, Cheshire, Eng: Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Hamon Mascy III wurde 1347 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Agathe De Theray mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon Mascy III(은)는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났다. 그는 Agathe De Theray(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hamon Mascy III родился в 1347 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Agathe De Theray. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.
